utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final plan includes all five keys. Now check full specification with required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. The plan lists a provider, monthly_cost, and general features, but does not explicitly state mental health coverage; thus not fully specified. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. The plan explicitly says 'Not explicitly addressed' with 0 cost and empty features; not fully specified. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. The plan has a provider, monthly_cost, features, but features suggest emergency support and risk assessment; it does not clearly state standard travel insurance coverages (medical, trip interruption, etc.). Ambiguous; likely not fully specified. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan includes two services each with monthly_cost and features; this is sufficiently specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. The plan includes monthly_total, annual_total, and a budget status; this is fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists specific providers or services. I matched each named item to the closest exact-name entry in the ground-truth ratings. Matches found: 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' appears in primary_health_coverage.physical_health and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance; both have explicit ratings. 'Telemedicine services' is listed as a feature within the health plan, but there is also a distinct enhancement service 'Telemedicine Services' with a rating; since the plan includes it only as a feature of the health plan rather than a separate add-on, I did not map it. 'Emergency Response Mapping' does not exist in the ground truth; the closest relevant travel option with rating is 'InsurePlus Standard Plan', but names must match exactly, so it is not mapped. 'Professional liability' and 'incident coordination' are not present in ground truth. Property coverage is 'Not explicitly addressed...' which has no match. Therefore, only items with exact matches are mapped.
